summary: Iteration 115 - AI Agents & Code Repo Fixes Testing. All 11 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified working. AI collaboration (Claude/ChatGPT) responding correctly via Emergent universal key fallback. gpt-5.4 family models confirmed in /api/ai-models. ZIP download and import are repo-scoped. GitHub pull/push endpoints accessible.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 115 are working: 1) GET /api/ai-models returns gpt-5.4, gpt-5.4-mini, gpt-5.4-nano as ChatGPT options with gpt-5.4 as default. 2) AI collaboration working - Claude and ChatGPT respond via Emergent universal key fallback; DeepSeek/Grok show expected 'API key required' system messages. 3) ZIP download is repo-scoped. 4) ZIP import is repo-scoped. 5) GitHub pull endpoint accessible for public repos. 6) GitHub push endpoint accessible. Code repo panel UI working with download/import/git buttons visible.

ai_models_endpoint.details: gpt-5.4, gpt-5.4-mini, gpt-5.4-nano present in ChatGPT models with gpt-5.4 as default

ai_collaboration.details: Claude and ChatGPT responding correctly via Emergent universal key fallback. DeepSeek/Grok show expected 'API key required' messages.

zip_download.details: ZIP download is repo-scoped - only contains files from the specified repo_id

zip_import.details: ZIP import is repo-scoped - imported files only appear in the target repo_id

github_pull.details: GitHub pull endpoint accessible for public repos without requiring saved PAT

github_push.details: GitHub push endpoint accessible and repo-scoped
